Summary: Gold standard kitchen ego dataset. 3 download options incl. Academic Torrents. Most extensive challenge ecosystem.
CC-BY-4.0! Multi-view RGB-D with HoloLens ego. Best-licensed hand-object dataset in this batch.
1362h living dataset, 240 scenes, 1965 tasks. CC-BY-SA-4.0. Direct S3 download. 6 modalities incl. hand pose, depth, IMU, narrations. 4 research labs + 3 industry partners (Mecka AI, Scale AI, Meta).
Superseded by EK-100 but still clean and fully accessible. Good for reproducibility of older baselines.
Massive 829h from Apple Vision Pro. Open on GitHub but license unclear. Check before using.
NVIDIA multi-view hand-grasping benchmark. Direct download. No formal license found.
Multi-person egocentric conversations. CC-BY-NC-4.0. Direct GitHub download via Facebook Research.
166h HoloLens2 industrial dataset. CDLAv2 permissive — commercial use explicitly allowed. 7 synchronized modalities. PyHoloAssist toolkit.
Best-in-class procedural dataset: 513h multi-view, CC-BY-NC, with great tooling. Just download it.
CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0. HoloLens2+Kinect. 7-day credentials.
CC-BY-NC-4.0. 300h, 264 people, ~70TB.
Gold standard for action segmentation. CC-BY-4.0! Not egocentric though  -  third-person views.
36-episode sample of 2,000+ hrs/week multimodal collection. 6 synced cameras, 256-taxel tactile gloves, 8 IMUs. Full stereo calibration. Apache 2.0. LeRobot v3. YC W26.
500h chest-cam egocentric dataset. 5,562 persons, 181 environments, 753 tasks. Apache 2.0. HuggingFace gated. Task labels via Gemini AI. YC W26.
10-clip crowdsourced sample; full dataset 1800+ clips at robox.to. CC-BY-NC-4.0. iPhone. Per-frame 21-joint hand keypoints (2D+3D), 6DoF pose + IMU in sensors.jsonl. Grasping-focused.
Newest EPIC-KITCHENS extension with digital kitchen twins. 263 annotations/min — densest in the family.
Most modalities and largest hours, but ~1 PB and no formal paper yet. Only for teams with serious infra.
No download found. CVPR 2023 paper only.
CC-BY-NC-4.0. Quest 3. 2688 seq.
Same as Nymeria. March 2026.
Custom academic. 383K synthetic frames.
CC-BY-NC-4.0. 143 sequences. Project Aria.
State-of-the-art hand-object tracking. CVPR 2025 highlight. Needs Ego4D license (~48h wait).
Largest ego dataset at 3670h. Gated but fast approval. Rich benchmarks across 5 task categories.
Best dataset for ego-exo correspondence. Synchronized Aria + 4-5 GoPros. Gated but same fast approval as Ego4D.
Excellent paired ego/exo data with direct S3 downloads; non-commercial AI2 license limits reuse.
Beautiful bimanual hand data with MANO/SMPLX. MPG registration required. Non-commercial.
Non-commercial. Stanford/Tsinghua.
Unique week-long continuous recording of 6 people cohabitating. S-Lab license terms not fully public.
Unified view across 6 datasets with standardized hand poses. Download via buried Box link — script still 'coming soon.'
Explicitly free for any purpose. Rare multimodal combo of video + audio + IMU + motion capture. Underused.
Rich 2.4M RGB-D frames with dense annotations. Direct OneDrive download. No license specified.
Good bimanual tool dataset with OneDrive/Dropbox downloads. No license specified.
No license. 550GB Google Drive. ICCV 2023 Oral.
Synthetic. No license. 1.25M images.
Real-world. No license. ~170GB.
~1M hours factory worker data. Apache-2.0. HuggingFace gated (requires account + data agreement). No academic paper. Build AI proprietary device. Not yet fully released (April 2026).
Small clean RGB-D ego dataset. Google Drive links work. Non-commercial only.
Tiny but clean RGB-D hand benchmark. 1.99 GB direct download. Non-commercial MPG license.
MPG non-commercial. CVPR 2021.
GitHub available.
Custom academic. 24K+ samples.
Recommended by the authors over GTEA/GTEA Gaze. No license but Dropbox links are live and downloads are fast.
Solid multi-view dataset but requires registration and license is unspecified. Check first.
Interesting multi-agent setup but gated + only RGB subset released. Niche use case.

First two-hand 3D interaction benchmark. ETH server may require access. No license found.
Classic hand action benchmark. Google Form gating. Magnetic sensor-based 3D hand poses.
